attributes.action: make school hours longer to make a shorter friday.
attributes.additional_details: Because school is stressful and exhausting, and mental health is so important to this generation it would be better is Friday could be shorter.
attributes.background: Make the school days 7 to 8 hours and then limit Friday to four hours.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Mandate seven-hour days Monday to Thursday in schools for shorter Fridays
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/741610
